titles.text: Dragon Quest Characters: Torneko no Daibouken 3
ドラゴンクエストキャラクターズ トルネコの大冒険 3 不思議のダンジョン

descriptions.text: Dragon Quest Characters: Torneko no Daibouken 3 Advance - Fushigi no Dungeon is a Role-Playing game, developed by ChunSoft and published by Square Enix, which was released in Japan in 2004.
